jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Naukri
jsonLd.description:
Join the Naukri family as a Frontend Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Naukri:
Naukri is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
